options.description: This method returns a list of customer contacts

options.description: Return the credentials for a contact. If contact does not have credentials, Authentication field will be null.

options.description: This method returns selected customer contact details

options.description: This method returns customer End User Portal URL

options.name: Get Customer List
options.description: This method returns list of customers

options.description: This method returns list of customer notes

options.name: Get Customer Zentitle Statistic
options.description: Return zentitle statistic for a given customer

options.name: Get Activation State
options.description: This method returns activation details including information about attributes and available features

options.name: Get an Entitlement Group
options.description: This method returns entitlement group details. The amount of data returned can be adjusted by using query expand parameter configuration.

options.name: Get Entitlement
options.description: This method returns entitlement details

options.name: Get Entitlement Group Authorized Contacts
options.description: This method returns list of contacts (with ABL credentials) authorized for the entitlement group

options.name: Get Entitlement Group List
options.description: This method returns entitlement group list. Amount of data returned can be adjusted by using query expand parameter configuration.

options.name: Get Entitlement List
options.description: This method returns list of entitlements that can be filtered by following query parameters

options.name: Get Entitlement Note
options.description: This method returns entitlement note

options.name: Get Entitlement Note List
options.description: This method returns list of entitlement notes

options.name: List of Entitlement Activations
options.description: This method returns list of entitlement activation that can be filtered by following query parameters

options.name: Log of Activations Activity
options.description: This method returns log of activations activity on the entitlement

options.name: Get Global Feature
options.description: This method returns selected global feature

options.name: Get Global Features List
options.description: This method returns list of all global features

options.name: Get Offering
options.description: This method returns offering details

options.name: Get Offering List
options.description: This method returns list of offering that can be filtered by the following query parameters

options.name: Get Plan
options.description: This method returns plan details

options.name: Get Plan List
options.description: This method returns list of plans that can be filtered by following query parameters

options.name: Get a Product List
options.description: This method returns a list of products that can be filtered by following query parameters

options.name: Get Edition
options.description: This method returns product edition details

options.name: Get Edition Attribute
options.description: This method returns selected attribute with value defined in edition level (in case of override). If no value is defined in edition level, value defined in higher level is returned.

options.name: Get Edition Attributes List
options.description: This method returns list of all attributes for selected edition

options.name: Get Edition Feature
options.description: This method returns selected feature with value defined in edition level (in case of override). If no value is defined in edition level, value defined in higher level is returned.

options.name: Get Edition Feature List
options.description: This method returns list of all features for selected edition

options.name: Get Edition List
options.description: This method returns list of editions that can be filtered by following query parameters

options.name: Get Product
options.description: This method returns product details

options.name: Get Product Attribute
options.description: This method returns selected attribute. In case of global attribute, if overridden value exists on product level, it will be returned, otherwise global value will be returned.

options.name: Get Product Attributes List
options.description: This method returns list of all attributes for selected product

options.name: Get Product Feature
options.description: This method returns selected feature. In case of global feature, if overridden value exists on product level, it will be returned, otherwise global value will be returned.

options.name: Get Product Features List
options.description: This method returns list of all features for selected product

options.name: Get Keywords For Site

options.name: Get Related Keywords
options.description: Get keywords appearing in the "searches related to" SERP element

options.name: Get Keyword Suggestions
options.description: Get search terms that are relevant to the product or service categories of all the specified keywords

options.name: Get Keyword Ideas
options.description: Get search terms that fall into the same Google product or service category as the specified keywords

options.name: Get Keyword Difficulty
options.description: Get Keyword Difficulty for the specified keywords

options.name: Get Search Intent
options.description: Get search intent data for up to 1,000 keywords

options.name: Get Keyword Overview
options.description: Get current cost-per-click, competition values for paid search, search volume, search intent, monthly searches, SERP and backlink information for specified keywords

options.name: Get Historical Keyword Data
options.description: Get Google historical keyword data for specified keywords, including search volume, cost-per-click, competition values for paid search, monthly searches, and search volume trends

options.name: Get Categories For Domain
options.description: Get Google product or service categories that include keywords the domain ranks for in search

options.name: Get Categories For Keywords
options.description: Get Google product and service categories related for each specified keyword

options.name: Get Keywords For Categories
options.description: Get a list of keywords relevant to the specified product categories

options.name: Get Domain Metrics By Categories
options.description: Get dynamics of change in metrics of domains relevant to the specified product and service categories

options.name: Get Top Searches
options.description: Get a set of relevant keyword data with Google Ads metrics, product categories, and Google SERP data

options.name: Get SERP Competitors
options.description: Get a list of domains ranking for the keywords you specify

options.name: Get Ranked Keywords
options.description: Get the list of keywords that any domain or webpage is ranking for

options.name: Get Competitors Domain
options.description: Get a full overview of ranking and traffic data of the competitor domains from organic and paid search

options.name: Get Domain Intersection
options.description: Get keywords for which both specified domains rank within the same SERP

options.name: Get Subdomains
options.description: Get the list of subdomains of the specified domain, along with the ranking distribution across organic and paid search

options.name: Get Relevant Pages
options.description: Get rankings and traffic data for the web pages of the specified domain

options.name: Get Domain Rank Overview
options.description: Get ranking and traffic data from organic search for a domain

options.name: Get Historical SERPs
options.description: Get Google SERPs collected within the specified time frame

options.name: Get Historical Rank Overview
options.description: Get historical data on rankings and traffic of the specified domain, such as domain ranking distribution in SERPs and estimated monthly traffic volume for both organic and paid results

options.name: Get Page Intersection
options.description: Get the keywords for which specified pages rank within the same SERP

options.name: Get Bulk Traffic Estimation
options.description: Get estimated monthly traffic volumes for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, or webpages

options.name: Get Historical Bulk Traffic Estimation
options.description: Get historical monthly traffic volumes for up to 1,000 domains collected within the specified time range through October 2020

options.name: Get Bulk Search Volume
options.description: Get search volume values for a maximum of 1,000 keywords in one API request

options.name: Get Related Keywords

options.name: Get Ranked Keywords
options.description: Get the list of keywords the target product ranks for on Amazon

options.name: Get Product Rank Overview

options.name: Get Product Competitors

options.name: Get Product Keyword Intersections

options.name: Get Bulk Keyword Difficulty

options.name: Get Bulk Traffic Estimation
options.description: Get estimated monthly traffic volumes for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, and pages

options.name: Get Competitors Domain
options.description: Get a full overview of ranking and traffic data of the competitor domains from organic and paid search

options.name: Get Domain Intersection
options.description: Get the keywords for which both specified domains rank within the same SERP

options.name: Get Domain Rank Overview
options.description: Get ranking and traffic data from Bing’s organic and paid search for the specified domain

options.name: Get Page Intersection
options.description: Get keywords for which specified pages rank within the same Bing SERP

options.name: Get Related Keywords
options.description: Get keywords appearing in the “searches related to” SERP element

options.name: Get Relevant Pages
options.description: Get rankings and traffic data for the web pages of the specified domain

options.name: Get SERP Competitors
options.description: Get a list of domain rankings for the keywords you specify

options.name: Get Subdomains
options.description: Get a list of subdomains of the specified domain, along with the ranking distribution across organic and paid search

options.name: Get Bulk App Metrics

options.name: Get Keywords for App

options.name: Get App Competitors

nodeDescription.subtitle: ={{(() => { const resourceLabels = { broadcasts: "broadcast", contacts: "contact", contactProperties: "contact property", domains: "domain", email: "email", receivingEmails: "received email", workflows: "workflow", events: "event", segments: "segment", templates: "template", topics: "topic", webhooks: "webhook" }; const operationLabels = { retrieve: "get", sendBatch: "send batch", listAttachments: "list attachments", getAttachment: "get attachment", addToSegment: "add to segment", listSegments: "list segments", removeFromSegment: "remove from segment", getTopics: "get topics", updateTopics: "update topics", listRuns: "list runs", getRun: "get run", listRunSteps: "list run steps", getRunStep: "get run step" }; const resource = $parameter["resource"]; const operation = $parameter["operation"]; const resourceLabel = resourceLabels[resource] ?? resource; const operationLabel = operationLabels[operation] ?? operation; return operationLabel + ": " + resourceLabel; })() }}

options.name: Broadcast
options.description: Create, send, update, or delete email broadcasts to reach multiple contacts at once

options.name: Contact
options.description: Add, update, delete, or list contacts (email subscribers) and manage their segment and topic memberships

options.name: Contact Property
options.description: Create, update, delete, or list custom contact properties (metadata fields) for storing additional contact information

options.name: Domain
options.description: Add, verify, update, or delete sending domains for email authentication and deliverability

options.name: Email
options.description: Send single or batch emails, retrieve sent emails, cancel scheduled emails, or manage email attachments

options.name: Event
options.description: Create, send, retrieve, update, or delete events for triggering workflows (private alpha)

options.name: Receiving Email
options.description: List and retrieve received emails and their attachments from inbound email processing

options.name: Segment
options.description: Create, update, delete, or list contact segments for grouping contacts based on criteria

options.name: Template
options.description: Create, update, publish, duplicate, or delete reusable email templates with dynamic variables

options.name: Topic
options.description: Create, update, delete, or list subscription topics for managing email preferences

options.name: Webhook
options.description: Create, update, delete, or list webhooks for receiving real-time notifications about email events

options.name: Workflow
options.description: Create, update, delete, or list automated email workflows and monitor runs (private alpha)

options.name: Cancel
options.description: Cancel a previously scheduled email by its email ID before it gets sent

options.name: Get Attachment
options.description: Download a specific attachment from a sent email using the email ID and attachment ID

options.name: List
options.description: Get a list of all previously sent emails with their status, subject, and recipients

options.name: List Attachments
options.description: Get all attachments from a sent email by providing the email ID

options.name: Retrieve
options.description: Get details of a specific sent email including subject, recipients, status, and timestamps

options.name: Send
options.description: Send a new email to one or more recipients with HTML or plain text content, attachments, and optional scheduling

options.name: Send and Wait for Response
options.action: Send email and wait for recipient response
options.description: Send an email with response buttons and pause workflow execution until the recipient clicks a response

options.name: Send Batch
options.description: Send up to 100 emails in a single API call for bulk email delivery with individual customization

options.name: Update
options.description: Reschedule a scheduled email by updating its scheduled_at time before it is sent

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new reusable email template with HTML content and dynamic variables for personalization

options.name: Delete
options.description: Permanently delete an email template by its template ID

options.name: Duplicate
options.description: Create a copy of an existing template with a new name for easy customization

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve a template's details including HTML content, variables, and publish status by template ID

options.name: List
options.description: Get all email templates with their names, IDs, and publish status

options.name: Publish
options.description: Publish a template to make it available for sending emails. Required before a template can be used in email operations.

options.name: Update
options.description: Update a template's name, subject, HTML content, or variables

options.name: Create
options.description: Add a new sending domain for email authentication. Returns DNS records that must be configured for verification.

options.name: Create Tracking Domain
options.description: Create a custom domain for click and open tracking (private alpha)

options.name: Delete
options.description: Remove a sending domain from your account. Emails can no longer be sent from this domain after deletion.

options.name: Delete Tracking Domain
options.description: Remove an existing click tracking domain (private alpha)

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve details of a domain including DNS records, verification status, and configuration

options.name: Get Tracking Domain
options.description: Retrieve a single click tracking domain with its DNS records and verification status (private alpha)

options.name: List
options.description: Get all sending domains with their verification status and DNS record requirements

options.name: List Tracking Domains
options.description: List all tracking domains for a given domain (private alpha)

options.name: Update
options.description: Update domain settings such as click tracking, open tracking, or TLS requirements

options.name: Verify
options.description: Trigger verification of DNS records for a domain. Use after configuring DNS to check if domain is ready for sending.

options.name: Verify Tracking Domain
options.description: Trigger DNS verification for a tracking domain (private alpha)

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new email broadcast campaign with subject, content, and target audience for bulk email sending

options.name: Delete
options.description: Permanently delete a broadcast campaign by its broadcast ID

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve details of a specific broadcast including status, subject, audience, and send statistics

options.name: List
options.description: Get a list of all broadcast campaigns with their status, subject lines, and creation dates

options.name: Send
options.description: Trigger the sending of a broadcast campaign to its target audience immediately or at a scheduled time

options.name: Update
options.description: Update a broadcast's subject, content, audience, or schedule before it is sent

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new contact segment for grouping contacts based on criteria or manual assignment

options.name: Delete
options.description: Permanently delete a segment by its segment ID. Contacts in the segment are not deleted.

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve details of a specific segment including its name, contact count, and creation date

options.name: List
options.description: Get all segments in the account with their names, IDs, and contact counts

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new subscription topic for organizing email preferences and managing unsubscribe options

options.name: Delete
options.description: Permanently delete a subscription topic by its topic ID

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve details of a specific topic including its name, description, and subscriber count

options.name: List
options.description: Get all subscription topics with their names, IDs, and subscriber counts

options.name: Update
options.description: Update a topic's name or description

options.name: Add to Segment
options.description: Add an existing contact to a segment by providing the contact ID and segment ID

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new contact with email address, optional name, custom properties, and segment/topic assignments

options.name: Delete
options.description: Permanently delete a contact by their contact ID

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve a contact's details including email, name, properties, and subscription status by contact ID

options.name: Get Topics
options.description: Get all topic subscriptions (opt-in/opt-out status) for a specific contact

options.name: List
options.description: Get a list of all contacts in the account with their email addresses and basic information

options.name: List Segments
options.description: Get all segments that a specific contact belongs to

options.name: Remove From Segment
options.description: Remove a contact from a segment by providing the contact ID and segment ID

options.name: Update
options.description: Update a contact's information including name, email, properties, or unsubscribe status

options.name: Update Topics
options.description: Update a contact's topic subscription preferences (opt-in or opt-out of specific topics)

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new custom contact property (metadata field) for storing additional information about contacts

options.name: Delete
options.description: Permanently delete a contact property. This removes the property from all contacts.

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve details of a specific contact property including its name, type, and configuration

options.name: List
options.description: Get all custom contact properties defined for storing contact metadata

options.name: Update
options.description: Update a contact property's name or configuration

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new webhook endpoint to receive real-time notifications for email events like delivered, opened, clicked, bounced

options.name: Delete
options.description: Delete a webhook endpoint. Events will no longer be sent to this URL.

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve details of a webhook including its URL, subscribed events, and status

options.name: List
options.description: Get all configured webhooks with their URLs, event subscriptions, and status

options.name: Update
options.description: Update a webhook's URL or the events it is subscribed to

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve a specific received email including sender, subject, body, and headers by email ID

options.name: Get Attachment
options.description: Download a specific attachment from a received email by email ID and attachment ID

options.name: List
options.description: Get all emails received through inbound email processing with sender, subject, and timestamps

options.name: List Attachments
options.description: Get all attachments from a received email including filenames, sizes, and content types

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new workflow to automate email sequences

options.name: Delete
options.description: Remove an existing workflow

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve a single workflow with its steps and edges

options.name: Get Run
options.description: Retrieve a single workflow run

options.name: Get Run Step
options.description: Retrieve a single workflow run step

options.name: List
options.description: Retrieve a list of workflows

options.name: List Run Steps
options.description: Retrieve a list of workflow run steps

options.name: List Runs
options.description: Retrieve a list of workflow runs

options.name: Update
options.description: Update an existing workflow (enable or disable)

options.name: Create
options.description: Create a new event that can be used to trigger workflows

options.name: Delete
options.description: Remove an existing event by ID or name

options.name: Get
options.description: Retrieve a single event by ID or name

options.name: List
options.description: Retrieve a list of events

options.name: Send
options.description: Send a named event to trigger matching workflows

options.name: Update
options.description: Update an existing event schema

options.name: AI Search

options.name: Backlinks

options.name: Get Summary

options.name: Get Metrics

options.name: Get All Backlinks

options.name: Get Cumulative History
options.description: Get daily total of live backlinks over a date range

options.name: Get Anchors
options.description: Get anchor texts of backlinks pointing to the target

options.name: Get Referring Domains
options.description: Get list of domains linking to the target

options.name: Get Referring Domains Count
options.description: Get number of unique referring domains

options.name: Get Referring Domains History
options.description: Get referring domains with new/lost links in a date range

options.name: Get Referring Domains History Count
options.description: Get count of referring domains with link changes

options.name: Get Referring IPs
options.description: Get IPv4 addresses of sites linking to the target

options.name: Get Referring IPs Count
options.description: Get number of unique IP addresses linking to the target

options.name: Get Referring Subnets Count
options.description: Get number of unique /24 IP subnets linking to the target

options.name: Get Indexed Pages
options.description: Get pages indexed or found by the backlink crawler

options.name: Get Authority
options.description: Get InLink Rank (page authority) and Domain InLink Rank

options.name: Get Domain Authority
options.description: Get Domain InLink Rank for the target domain

options.name: Get Domain Authority Distribution
options.description: Get distribution of domain authority scores among linking domains

options.name: Get Page Authority
options.description: Get InLink Rank (authority) for the target URL

options.name: Get Page Authority History
options.description: Get historical InLink Rank values for the target URL

options.name: Get Regional Database Overview
options.description: Get detailed statistics for a specific regional database (FAST)

options.name: Get Worldwide Aggregate
options.description: Get worldwide aggregate statistics for a domain (RECOMMENDED)

options.name: Get Worldwide Aggregate for URL
options.description: Aggregate a specific URL's global search performance statistics for both organic and paid traffic

options.name: Get Domain Pages
options.description: Get a filterable list of pages for a domain with their keyword performance metrics

options.name: Get Domain Subdomains
options.description: Get a list of subdomains for a domain with their traffic and keyword metrics

options.name: Get Overview History
options.description: Get historical domain metrics over a date range

options.name: Get Keywords
options.description: Get keywords for which a domain ranks

options.name: Get Keywords Comparison
options.description: Compare keyword rankings between two domains

options.name: Get Competitors
options.description: Get competitor domains

options.name: Get Paid Ads for Keyword
options.description: Get domains advertising on a specific keyword

options.name: Get Paid Ads for Domain
options.description: Get keywords a domain is advertising on

options.name: Export Metrics
options.description: Get volume, CPC, competition, and difficulty for multiple keywords

options.name: Get Similar Keywords
options.description: Find semantically similar keywords

options.name: Get Related Keywords
options.description: Find topically related keywords with overlapping URLs

options.name: Get Question Keywords
options.description: Find question-based keywords

options.name: Get Longtail Keywords
options.description: Find long-tail keyword variations

options.name: Add Tasks
options.description: Create SERP tasks for keywords (returns task IDs)

options.name: Get Results (standard)
options.description: Get status or standard SERP results for a task

options.name: List Tasks
options.description: List recent SERP tasks (last 24 hours)

options.name: Get Advanced Results
options.description: Retrieve advanced (detailed) SERP results

options.name: Get Locations
options.description: Get available location IDs for SERP queries

options.name: Create Standard Audit
options.description: Launch a standard (HTML) site audit

options.name: Create Advanced Audit
options.description: Launch a JS-rendered site audit (for SPAs)

options.name: List Audits
options.description: Get all audits with status for the account

options.name: Get Audit Status
options.description: Get status/progress of a specific audit

options.name: Get Audit Report
options.description: Retrieve full audit report for a completed audit

options.name: Get Crawled Pages
options.description: Get list of crawled pages for an audit

options.name: Get Issues by Type
options.description: Get pages affected by a specific issue type

options.name: Get Issues by URL
options.description: Get all issue details for a specific audited URL

options.name: Get Links
options.description: Get all outgoing links found during the audit

options.name: Get Audit History
options.description: Get historical snapshot of a specific audit run

options.name: Update Audit
options.description: Update the title of an audit

options.name: Delete Audit
options.description: Delete an audit by ID

options.name: Recheck Standard Audit
options.description: Re-run a standard audit with same settings

options.name: Recheck Advanced Audit
options.description: Re-run an advanced audit with same settings

nodeDescription.description: Interact with SE Ranking API for SEO data

attributes.description: Interact with SE Ranking API for SEO data
attributes.name: @seranking/n8n-nodes-seranking.seRanking
